message:
fix(tui): update 6 tests for 8-variant View enum (Timeline added)

View expanded from 7→8 variants with Timeline. Fix test assertions:
- focus_traversal_full_cycle: iterate 8 times not 7
- e2e_full_view_tour: include Timeline in expected cycle
- e2e_rapid_view_switch_stress: 100%8=4 (History) not 100%7=2 (Events)
- chaos_100_rapid_tab_cycles_with_data: same modular arithmetic fix
- snapshot_home_degraded_80x24: use lenient assert_tab_bar (8 tabs truncated at 80 cols)
- snapshot_tab_bar_structure_80: allow 8th tab truncation at 80-col width

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
